{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/plans/effervescent-imagining-thompson.md","content":"# Plan: Classify P2T29 — Compose retry after failure

## Context

P2T29 is a test-suite Phase 2 verification task within the Kody-Engine-Tester project. The task tests the compose retry behavior in the Kody-ADE-Engine — specifically that when `@kody compose` is invoked a second time on an issue that already completed P2T28 (compose after --no-compose), the compose operation correctly skips already-merged branches and retries from the verify stage instead of re-merging.

This is the taskify classification step — the agent writes the classification to `task.json` in the task directory, which downstream pipeline stages consume.
